subtitle: A golden guardian of courage, clarity, and unwavering confidence
heroDesc: Tiger Eye captures the fierce beauty of a predator's gaze, its golden-brown bands shimmering with a silky chatoyancy that seems to shift and breathe in the light. For thousands of years, warriors and merchants alike have carried this stone as a talisman of protection and prosperity. Whether you are facing a daunting challenge or simply need a steady hand guiding your decisions, Tiger Eye grounds your ambition in calm, focused power.

perspectives.scientific: Tiger Eye is a chatoyant variety of microcrystalline quartz (SiO₂) formed through the pseudomorphic replacement of crocidolite (blue asbestos) fibers by silica. It ranks 7 on the Mohs hardness scale, making it highly durable for everyday jewelry wear. Major deposits are found in South Africa, Western Australia, India, and Brazil. The signature golden-brown chatoyancy arises from parallel crocidolite fibers that reflect light in a single band, creating the stone's namesake silky luster.
perspectives.spiritual: Tiger Eye resonates powerfully with the solar plexus chakra, the body's center of personal will, self-esteem, and action. Associated with the zodiac signs of Leo and Capricorn, it channels the bold energy of the sun into grounded, purposeful drive. Ancient Roman soldiers wore engraved Tiger Eye into battle for courage and protection, while in Chinese tradition it was linked to the tiger, a symbol of imperial power and righteous authority.
perspectives.psychological: The warm amber and gold tones of Tiger Eye are associated in color psychology with confidence, optimism, and mental clarity. Therapists working with goal-setting and motivation often recommend Tiger Eye as a tactile anchor during visualization exercises, helping clients maintain focus on their objectives. Its steady, grounded energy can reduce self-doubt and promote decisive action, making it a favorite among professionals navigating high-pressure environments.

attributes.origin: South Africa, Western Australia, India, Brazil

benefits.title: Boosts Confidence and Courage
benefits.desc: Tiger Eye activates the solar plexus chakra, infusing you with the self-assurance needed to face challenges head-on and speak your truth without hesitation.

benefits.title: Enhances Focus and Mental Clarity
benefits.desc: The grounding energy of Tiger Eye cuts through mental fog, helping you organize your thoughts and stay locked on your priorities throughout the day.

benefits.title: Attracts Prosperity and Abundance
benefits.desc: Long regarded as a merchant's stone, Tiger Eye is believed to draw wealth and opportunity by aligning your actions with clear, purposeful intention.

benefits.title: Provides Energetic Protection
benefits.desc: Tiger Eye acts as a reflective shield, deflecting negative energy and returning it to its source while keeping your own energy field stable and secure.

benefits.title: Supports Emotional Balance
benefits.desc: By harmonizing the extremes of emotion, Tiger Eye helps you stay calm during stressful situations without losing your drive or motivation.

benefits.title: Promotes Willpower and Discipline
benefits.desc: Carrying Tiger Eye strengthens your resolve to follow through on commitments, break unproductive habits, and maintain consistency in your daily routines.

benefits.title: Encourages Grounded Decision-Making
benefits.desc: Tiger Eye's earth-fire duality keeps you connected to practical reality while igniting creative solutions, leading to decisions that are both inspired and realistic.

usageScenes.title: Wear It Daily
usageScenes.desc: Slip a Tiger Eye bracelet on your dominant wrist to channel its confidence-boosting energy into every handshake, conversation, and decision you make throughout the day.

usageScenes.title: Meditation Companion
usageScenes.desc: Hold a Tiger Eye palm stone at your solar plexus during meditation. Visualize its golden light filling your core with warmth and steady resolve as you breathe deeply.

usageScenes.title: Home Sanctuary
usageScenes.desc: Place Tiger Eye near the entrance of your home or office to create a protective energetic boundary. Its presence helps filter out negativity and welcomes prosperity.

usageScenes.title: Ritual & Ceremony
usageScenes.desc: Use Tiger Eye in abundance rituals by placing it on a prosperity grid with Citrine and Clear Quartz. Set clear financial intentions under the new moon and carry the stone with you afterward.

pairings.name: Clear Quartz
pairings.why: Clear Quartz amplifies Tiger Eye's manifestation energy, creating a focused beam of intention that accelerates goal achievement and clarity of purpose.

pairings.name: Black Tourmaline
pairings.why: Black Tourmaline adds a deep grounding layer to Tiger Eye's protection, forming an impenetrable energy shield that keeps you safe and centered in any environment.

pairings.name: Citrine
pairings.why: Citrine and Tiger Eye together create a powerhouse abundance combo, with Citrine radiating joyful prosperity and Tiger Eye grounding it in disciplined action.

relatedCrystals.name: Citrine
relatedCrystals.benefit: Amplifies abundance energy and brings joyful optimism to manifestation work

relatedCrystals.name: Pyrite
relatedCrystals.benefit: Strengthens willpower and attracts wealth with its bold metallic energy

relatedCrystals.name: Carnelian
relatedCrystals.benefit: Ignites creative passion and vitality to complement Tiger Eye's focused drive

relatedCrystals.name: Obsidian
relatedCrystals.benefit: Deepens grounding and provides intense protection alongside Tiger Eye's shielding

faqs.title: How do I cleanse Tiger Eye?
faqs.content: Tiger Eye can be cleansed by smudging with sage or palo santo, placing it on a Selenite charging plate, or resting it on a bed of dry sea salt overnight. Avoid soaking it in water for extended periods, as prolonged moisture can affect the stone's polish over time.

faqs.title: Which wrist should I wear Tiger Eye on?
faqs.content: Most crystal practitioners recommend wearing Tiger Eye on your dominant or right wrist to project its confidence and protection outward into the world. However, if your intention is to absorb its grounding energy internally, wearing it on the left wrist works equally well.

faqs.title: What chakra is Tiger Eye associated with?
faqs.content: Tiger Eye is primarily associated with the solar plexus chakra, located in the upper abdomen. This chakra governs personal power, self-confidence, and willpower, all of which align with Tiger Eye's core metaphysical properties.

faqs.title: Is Tiger Eye safe to wear in water?
faqs.content: Brief contact with water is generally safe due to its hardness of 7, but prolonged soaking is not recommended. Extended submersion can gradually degrade the stone's polish and affect the chatoyant luster. Remove your Tiger Eye bracelet before swimming or bathing.

faqs.title: What is the difference between Tiger Eye and Hawk's Eye?
faqs.content: Hawk's Eye (also called Blue Tiger Eye) is the earlier stage of the same pseudomorphic process, where the crocidolite fibers have not yet been fully replaced by silica. It retains a blue-gray color, while Tiger Eye has completed the transformation to golden brown through further oxidation.
